## Scope check

- [ ] This is a procedure / output-structure layer, not a model-capability transplant
- [ ] If it makes any performance claim, it comes with a benchmark plan (raw data + limitations)
- [ ] It keeps runtime dependencies at zero, or justifies the trade-off
- [ ] It can be enforced or verified by a fail-closed gate where applicable
